summary: Iter 227 frontend verification of NEW Events Management UI (Locations + Showtimes + Legacy tabs) and Cinema Showtime CRUD. Full end-to-end create flows on Events Management exercised as admin@test.com and all PASS: (a) Management tab inside Events shows three sub-tabs with the exact data-testids events-tab-locations / events-tab-showtimes / events-tab-legacy; (b) Locations sub-tab: Create Location button opens location-editor dialog, filled name='QA Test Venue 1781639545', city=Douala, address='1 Test Rd', operator='Carter Entertainment' (1st in OperatorSelector list of 7), layout=simple, capacity=300, save fires toast 'Location created' and the new venue card renders in the grid with capacity 300 and address '1 Test Rd' (grid count 5 -> 6); (c) Showtimes sub-tab: add-showtime-btn present, showtime-editor opens, location select populated, title='QA Concert 1781639555', start=2027-03-15T18:30, end=2027-03-15T21:30, price=5000, total=100 -> toast 'Showtime created' and showtime card appears; (d) Legacy Events sub-tab: read-only banner 'Legacy Events (read-only)' visible, NO add-event-btn in DOM (count=0), one existing legacy event 'Concert Nyangono du Sud' is rendered with an Edit button, clicking it opens the 'Edit Legacy Event' dialog with the existing legacy form (title, gallery, venue, dates, price, capacity, contact, operator). Cinema Showtime CRUD (mani-monroe operator) NOT re-exercised in this iteration — main agent's prior manual verification (Edit/Replace/Delete buttons appear and 'Showtime updated' toast fires) is taken at face value per the review request. No new bugs found.

issues: Address field has no data-testid (only its placeholder '123 Akwa Boulevard' identifies it); description, lat/long, policies and zone fields also lack testids. Minor: tests fell back to placeholder selector.

verified_via_playwright: Management nested tab activates Locations/Showtimes/Legacy Events sub-tabs (all three testids found, count=1 each).

Locations sub-tab: add-location-btn opens location-editor dialog; location-name-input, location-city-input, address (by placeholder), location-operator-selector (7 options), layout-option-simple, location-capacity-input all interactive; save-location-btn -> toast 'Location created' -> new card 'QA Test Venue 1781639545' renders with Capacity 300, City Douala, Address '1 Test Rd', Layout 'Simple'.

Showtimes sub-tab: add-showtime-btn opens showtime-editor; showtime-location-select dropdown lists locations including the new venue; showtime-title-input, showtime-start-input (datetime-local), showtime-end-input, class-name-0/class-price-0/class-total-0 all writable; save-showtime-btn -> toast 'Showtime created' -> showtime card 'QA Concert 1781639555' renders.

Legacy Events sub-tab: 'Legacy Events (read-only)' banner present; add-event-btn count=0 (correctly removed); 'Edit' on existing event opens dialog titled 'Edit Legacy Event' with the legacy form intact (submit label 'Update Legacy Event').
action_items: (Nice-to-have, not blocking) Add data-testid attributes for the remaining Location editor inputs: address (location-address-input), description (location-description-input), latitude/longitude (location-lat-input/location-lng-input), zones (location-zone-name-{idx}/location-zone-capacity-{idx}). Tests currently rely on the placeholder '123 Akwa Boulevard' for address.
critical_code_review_comments: LocationsAndShowtimesTabs.jsx is 664 LoC — within the 700 ceiling but already houses two large editors (LocationEditor, ShowtimeEditor) plus the two sub-tab list views; consider splitting LocationEditor.jsx and ShowtimeEditor.jsx into their own files before adding more layout types.

OperatorSelector for admin returns a searchable combobox; locations editor calls it WITHOUT the required prop, so an admin who forgets to pick gets a client-side 'Pick an operator' toast on save (good). On UPDATE the selector is intentionally hidden (operator is locked to existing) — confirm that backend PUT /api/event-locations/{id} ignores operator_id changes from a forged client payload (defence in depth).

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 4 review-request bullets that were actionable in this session PASS; Cinema bullet relied on main agent's prior verification per the handoff note.

test_credentials: admin@test.com / testpassword123 (used). mani-monroe@netflix.com / testpassword123 (not re-exercised, prior manual verification accepted).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 new Location ('QA Test Venue 1781639545', Douala, capacity 300, operator Carter Entertainment, layout Simple/theater_rows) and 1 new Showtime ('QA Concert 1781639555', 2027-03-15 18:30 → 21:30, Standard class 5000 FCFA × 100 units). Both persisted and visible in the listings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New Events Management UI is fully functional end-to-end for the Admin role: Locations create (location-editor + save-location-btn -> toast 'Location created') and Showtimes create (showtime-editor + save-showtime-btn -> toast 'Showtime created') both persist. Legacy tab correctly read-only (no add-event-btn) but keeps Edit/Delete on existing legacy events. Tabs are nested: /management/events -> click 'Management' top tab -> then click one of events-tab-locations / events-tab-showtimes / events-tab-legacy. Address field in LocationEditor lacks a testid; everything else has the testids documented in the review request. Cinema Showtime CRUD was not re-verified in this iteration — handoff note from main agent says it is already working end-to-end (Edit opens dialog, save fires 'Showtime updated' toast, Replace + Delete fire correctly).
rca of the issue: No bug surfaced in this iteration — all four review request bullets verified.
